findings.title: mlflow/mlflow
findings.description: The open source AI engineering platform for agents, LLMs, and ML models. MLflow enables teams of all sizes to debug, evaluate, monitor, and optimize production-quality AI applications while controlling costs and managing access to models and data.

findings.title: raga-ai-hub/RagaAI-Catalyst
findings.description: Python SDK for Agent AI Observability, Monitoring and Evaluation Framework. Includes features like agent, llm and tools tracing, debugging multi-agentic system, self-hosted dashboard and advanced analytics with timeline and execution graph view

findings.title: apache/hertzbeat
findings.description: An AI-powered next-generation open source real-time observability system.

findings.title: AgentOps-AI/agentops
findings.description: Python SDK for AI agent monitoring, LLM cost tracking, benchmarking, and more. Integrates with most LLMs and agent frameworks including CrewAI, Agno, OpenAI Agents SDK, Langchain, Autogen, AG2, and CamelAI

findings.title: coze-dev/coze-loop
findings.description: Next-generation AI Agent Optimization Platform: Cozeloop addresses challenges in AI agent development by providing full-lifecycle management capabilities from development, debugging, and evaluation to monitoring.

findings.title: builderz-labs/mission-control
findings.description: Self-hosted AI agent orchestration platform: dispatch tasks, run multi-agent workflows, monitor spend, and govern operations from one mission control dashboard.

findings.title: TracecatHQ/tracecat
findings.description: The AI automation platform built for security teams and agents.

findings.title: lmnr-ai/lmnr
findings.description: Laminar - open-source observability platform purpose-built for AI agents. YC S24.

findings.title: kite-org/kite
findings.description: 🪁 A lightweight, modern Kubernetes dashboard that unifies multi-cluster and resource management, enterprise-grade user governance (OAuth, RBAC, and audit logs), and AI agents in one workspace. Not just a tool, but more like a platform.

findings.title: openlit/openlit
findings.description: Open source platform for AI Engineering: OpenTelemetry-native LLM Observability, GPU Monitoring, Guardrails, Evaluations, Prompt Management, Vault, Playground. 🚀💻 Integrates with 50+ LLM Providers, VectorDBs, Agent Frameworks and GPUs.

findings.title: apache/burr
findings.description: Build applications that make decisions (chatbots, agents, simulations, etc...). Monitor, trace, persist, and execute on your own infrastructure.

findings.title: shuyu-labs/AntSK
findings.description: An AI knowledge base/agent built with .Net 9, AntBlazor, Semantic Kernel, and Kernel Memory, supporting local offline AI large models. It can run offline without an internet connection. Supports Aspire for monitoring application data.

findings.title: e2b-dev/awesome-ai-sdks
findings.description: A database of SDKs, frameworks, libraries, and tools for creating, monitoring, debugging and deploying autonomous AI agents

findings.title: crabwise-ai/crabwalk
findings.description: 🦀 Crabwalk 🦀 Real-time companion monitor for OpenClaw agents.

findings.title: tugcantopaloglu/openclaw-dashboard
findings.description: 🔐 Secure, real-time monitoring dashboard for OpenClaw AI agents. Auth, TOTP MFA, cost tracking, live feed, memory browser and more.

findings.title: kibitzsh/kibitz
findings.description: Real-time decoded feed of AI agent actions — monitor multiple Claude Code & Codex sessions, see exactly what each agent is doing, and coordinate swarms efficiently

findings.title: modelence/modelence
findings.description: Modelence is a full-stack framework for building production web apps with a built-in database, authentication and monitoring. Modelence is opinionated and AI agent-first, which means it's optimized for AI code generation with built-in guardrails.

findings.title: mudrii/openclaw-dashboard
findings.description: A beautiful, zero-dependency command center for OpenClaw AI agents

findings.title: airweave-ai/error-monitoring-agent
findings.description: Intelligent error monitoring agent that uses Airweave to find context from your code, tickets, and Slack. Clusters similar errors, enriches with relevant context, and creates actionable alerts.

findings.title: evilmartians/agent-prism
findings.description: React components for visualizing traces from AI agents
